description:
Retrofit the residential building to reduce energy use by adding solar and insulation, WITHOUT modifying the South-facing facade or South-facing roof (simulating strict HOA constraints). The starting file 'building-passive-heating.ng3' is open. The South facade is the one with the large main windows and front door.

Perform the following:
1. Decrease the U-value of the non-South walls (North, East, West) to 0.5 or lower. Leave the South wall unchanged.
2. Decrease the U-value of the windows on the non-South walls to 1.5 or lower. Leave the South windows unchanged.
3. Add at least 6 solar panels (or a solar rack array) to the East, West, or North roof facets.
4. Ensure ZERO solar panels are placed on the South-facing roof facet.
5. Run the Annual Energy Analysis to confirm net energy reduction.
6. Save the modified project as ~/Documents/Energy3D/hoa_compliant_retrofit.ng3
